name: long_history_normal_path
description: SPY history with 50 days (well above MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS=20 and MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS-1=19). run_monte_carlo runs the full MC path with the standardized kNN feature vector (Cluster 2 AC-1) and the early-window candidate-pool exclusion (AC-4). Negative control for the short-history fixture: result must be a finite float in [0, 100], distinct from the insufficient-history sentinel.
derivation: 50 >= MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS(20): guard passes, full MC runs. Re-captured from the fixed producer at branch fix/mc-knn-exit-gate HEAD 7ff61a4 (Cluster 2) with run_monte_carlo(..., seed=42). The value shifted from the pre-Cluster-2 51.5 because AC-1 standardizes the kNN feature vector (z-score both features) and AC-4 excludes the first MC_VOL_WINDOW_DAYS-1 early-window days from the candidate pool — both intentionally change which regime neighbours are selected. Provenance: captured-from-the-fixed-producer (the corrected behaviour is the new spec). Differs from the 15-day fixture (the insufficient sentinel) because that path short-circuits before the MC draw.
